nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Polls inbox every 5 minutes. Adjust interval as needed.

nodes.name: Fetch Unread Emails
nodes.notes: SETUP: Add IMAP credentials. Works with Gmail (enable IMAP + App Password), Outlook, or any IMAP server.

nodes.name: Classify Email Priority
nodes.notes: CUSTOMIZE: Add your own keywords to urgentKeywords/lowKeywords arrays.

nodes.name: Is Urgent?
nodes.notes: Splits into URGENT vs NORMAL/LOW paths

parameters.subject: Re: {{ $json.subject }} — We're On It [Urgent]
parameters.message:
Hi {{ $json.senderName }},

Thank you for reaching out. We've flagged your message as urgent and a team member will respond within 2 hours.

If this is a critical emergency, please call us directly at: [REPLACE_WITH_PHONE_NUMBER]

Your reference number: {{ $json.messageId }}

Best regards,
[REPLACE_WITH_COMPANY_NAME] Support Team

nodes.name: Send Urgent Auto-Reply
nodes.notes: CUSTOMIZE: Edit the email template. Replace [REPLACE_WITH_*] placeholders.

parameters.subject: Re: {{ $json.subject }} — Thanks for contacting us
parameters.message:
Hi {{ $json.senderName }},

Thank you for getting in touch! We've received your message and will get back to you within 24 hours.

Want a faster answer? Check our FAQ at: [REPLACE_WITH_FAQ_URL]

Best regards,
[REPLACE_WITH_COMPANY_NAME] Team

nodes.name: Send Standard Auto-Reply
nodes.notes: CUSTOMIZE: Edit the standard reply template. LOW priority emails also get this reply.

nodes.name: Skip Low Priority?
nodes.notes: LOW priority emails (newsletters, etc.) don't get auto-replies to avoid spam loops

nodes.name: Log to Google Sheet
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create a Google Sheet with tab named 'Email_Log'. Replace the sheet ID.

motionElevation.description: Automatically triages incoming emails by urgency, sends appropriate auto-reply, and logs everything to a Google Sheet.
